title: Deliciously Cheesy Thai Rice Noodles
description: A post-workout savory Thai dish featuring ginger, cheese-pull, and halal-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Cook the Thai rice noodles according to the package instructions, then set aside.
In a large skillet or wok, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
Add the grated ginger and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the red curry paste and cook for another minute, stirring constantly.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Add the honey, soy sauce, and cooked noodles to the skillet, and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and let the mixture simmer for 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the cheddar cheese until melted and well combined.
Transfer the noodle mixture to a serving dish and top with green onions and sesame seeds.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional green onions and sesame seeds if desired.
Drizzle with additional sauce if desired.
